title: AI, Growth, and the Future of Healthcare | Anish Acharya & Sachin Jain
content: Anish Acharya and Sachin Jain discuss AI's transformative impact on healthcare and enterprise operations. Acharya argues AI is fundamentally different from productivity tools—it can perform work autonomously. They examine AI adoption in large organizations, its effects on customer support, software development, and healthcare operations. Key traits for successful adaptation include curiosity, experimentation, and ambition. The conversation also addresses AI's potential to reduce healthcare costs, improve patient experiences, and drive economic growth and human flourishing.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Anish Acharya, Sachin Jain)

normalizedTitle: ai growth and the future of healthcare anish acharya sachin jain

title: 实测「神话」级模型 Fable 5：强者世界里的最强者 | AI 上新 | 原文
content: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5, the first publicly available Mythos-class AI model previously restricted to about 40 cybersecurity organizations due to its reportedly extreme capabilities. Fable 5 shares the same underlying architecture as the internal Mythos 5 but with added safety guardrails. The review found it exceptionally strong in coding and agent tasks, positioning it as a leading model among existing powerful AI systems.

title: 美团发布 AI 浏览器 Tabbit 1.0
content: Meituan's GN06 team launched Tabbit 1.0, an AI-native browser that serves as an AI gateway. It integrates multiple major large language models and can automatically execute complex cross-software and cross-webpage tasks based on user input. The standard version is permanently free and available on Windows and macOS, with mobile testing underway.
